accounts.name: payer
docs: Server wallet — pays for delegation

accounts.name: payer
docs: Fee payer on PER (sessionKp or wallet)

accounts.name: player
docs: The player joining the game — pays only the bet, signs to authorize

accounts.name: payer
docs: Server wallet — pays for PDA rent (player_state + player_guess)

accounts.name: payer
docs: Fee payer on PER — either the creator's wallet or their session keypair

accounts.name: payer
docs: Session signer (paid fees on PER; wallet or ephemeral session keypair)

accounts.name: round_secret
docs: Program reads target from here — players can't read via RPC (permission: members=[])

accounts.name: vrf_program_identity
docs: VRF program identity — only the Ephemeral VRF program can sign here.

accounts.name: round_secret
docs: The RoundSecret PDA. Owned by THIS program → direct mutation OK.

errors.name: GameNotWaiting
errors.msg: Game is not in Waiting state

errors.name: GameNotPlaying
errors.msg: Game is not in Playing state

errors.name: AlreadyFound
errors.msg: Player already found the number this round

errors.name: MaxAttemptsReached
errors.msg: Max attempts reached for this round

errors.name: InvalidGameStatus
errors.msg: Game is not in the expected status

errors.name: MaxPlayersReached
errors.msg: Max players reached for this game

errors.name: InvalidAuthority
errors.msg: Invalid authority — session token does not match player state

fields.name: bet_amount
docs: Bet amount in lamports

fields.name: authority
docs: Creator of the game

fields.name: players
docs: Player state PDAs registry (max 10)

fields.name: round_found_count
docs: Number of players who found the number this round

fields.name: entries
docs: Player pubkeys sorted by rank (index 0 = best)

fields.name: attempts
docs: Total attempts per player (parallel array)

fields.name: times
docs: Total time per player in ms (tiebreaker)

fields.name: proximity
docs: Proximity level (0-6)

fields.name: total_attempts
docs: Total attempts across all rounds (scoring)

fields.name: total_time_slot
docs: Total time in ms to find numbers (tiebreaker)

fields.name: inactive_rounds
docs: Consecutive rounds without submission (>= 3 = eliminated)

fields.name: targets
docs: Target numbers revealed after each round

fields.name: player_attempts
docs: Attempts per player per round

fields.name: player_found
docs: Whether player found the number per round

fields.name: target_number
docs: VRF-generated target number (0-1000)

fields.name: payout_status
docs: 0 = Pending, 1 = Distributed
